member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend
member.summary: Specifies what backend to use when creating a .

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend.Hardware
member.summary: Requires a GPU supporting hardware accelerated ray tracing.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend.Compute
member.summary: Software implementation of ray tracing that requires the GPU to support compute shaders.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext
member.summary: Entry point for the UnifiedRayTracing API.
member.remarks:
It provides functionality to:
load shader code (CreateRayTracingShader)
create an acceleration structure (CreateAccelerationStructure) that represents the geometry to be ray traced against.
Once these objects have been created, the shader code can be executed by calling IRayTracingShader.Dispatch Before calling Dispose() on a RayTracingContext, all that have been created by a RayTracingContext must be disposed as well.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.#ctor(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend,UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingResources)
member.summary: Creates a RayTracingContext.
member.param: The chosen backend.
The resources (provides the various shaders the context needs to operate).
member.exception: Thrown when the supplied backend is not supported.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.#ctor(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingResources)
member.summary: Creates a RayTracingContext.
member.param: The resources (provides the various shaders the context needs to operate).
member.exception: Thrown when no supported backend is available.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the RaytracingContext.
member.remarks: Before calling this, all that have been created with this RayTracingContext must be disposed as well.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.Resources
member.summary: object this context has been created with.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.IsBackendSupported(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend)
member.summary: Checks if the specified backend is supported on the current GPU.
member.param: The backend.
member.returns: Whether the specified bakend is supported.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.CreateRayTracingShader(UnityEngine.Object)
member.summary: Creates a IRayTracingShader.
member.remarks: Depending on the chosen backend, the shader parameter needs to be either a ComputeShader or RayTracingShader.
member.param: The ComputeShader or RayTracingShader asset.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.LoadRayTracingShader(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a unified ray tracing shader from .urtshader asset file.
member.remarks: - This API works only in the Unity Editor, not at runtime. - The path must be relative to the project folder, for example: "Assets/Stuff/myshader.urtshader". - A .urtshader asset file is imported in the Editor as 2 shaders: a ComputeShader and a RayTracingShader. LoadRayTracingShader loads the one relevant one depending on the RayTracingContext's backend.
member.param: Path to the .urtshader shader asset file to load.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.LoadRayTracingShaderFromAssetBundle(UnityEngine.AssetBundle,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a unified ray tracing shader from an AssetBundle.
member.param: The AssetBundle.
The asset name with the .urtshader extension included.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.CreateAccelerationStructure(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.AccelerationStructureOptions)
member.summary: Creates a IRayTracingAccelStruct.
member.param: Options for quality/performance trade-offs for the returned acceleration structure

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.GetRequiredTraceScratchBufferSizeInBytes(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns the minimum size that is required by the scratchBuffer parameter of .
member.param: Number of threads in the X dimension.
Number of threads in the Y dimension.
Number of threads in the Z dimension.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.GetScratchBufferStrideInBytes
member.summary: Required stride for the creation of the scratchBuffers used by and .

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingContext.BackendType
member.summary: The this context was created with.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BuildFlags
member.summary: Specifies how Unity builds the acceleration structure on the GPU.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BuildFlags.None
member.summary: Specify no options for the acceleration structure build. Provides a trade-off between good ray tracing performance and fast build times.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BuildFlags.PreferFastTrace
member.summary: Build a high quality acceleration structure, increasing build time but maximizing ray tracing performance.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BuildFlags.PreferFastBuild
member.summary: Build a lower quality acceleration structure, minimizing build time but decreasing ray tracing performance.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BuildFlags.MinimizeMemory
member.summary: Minimize the amount of temporary memory Unity uses when building the acceleration structure, and minimize the size of the result.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.AccelerationStructureOptions
member.summary: Options used to configure the creation of a .

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.AccelerationStructureOptions.buildFlags
member.summary: Option for the quality of the built .

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.AccelerationStructureOptions.useCPUBuild
member.summary: Enables building the acceleration structure on the CPU instead of the GPU. Enabling this option combined with the use of the PreferFastBuild flag provides the best possible ray tracing performance.
member.remarks: This field works only in the Unity Editor, not at runtime.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper
member.summary: Helper functions that can be used to create a scratch buffer.
member.remarks: A scratch buffer is a GraphicsBuffer that Unity uses during the acceleration structure build or the ray tracing dispatch to store temporary data.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.ScratchBufferTarget
member.summary: suitable for scratch buffers used in for both and .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.CreateDispatchIndirectBuffer
member.summary: Creates an indirect args buffer suitable for .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.CreateScratchBufferForBuildAndDispatch(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct,UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates a scratch buffer suitable for both and .
member.param: The acceleration structure that will be passed to .
The shader that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the X dimension that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the Y dimension that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the Z dimension that will be passed to .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.CreateScratchBufferForBuild(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct)
member.summary: Creates a scratch buffer suitable for .
member.param: The acceleration structure that will be passed to .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.CreateScratchBufferForTrace(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Creates a scratch buffer suitable for .
member.param: The shader that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the X dimension that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the Y dimension that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the Z dimension that will be passed to .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.ResizeScratchBufferForTrace(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer@)
member.summary: Resizes a scratch buffer if its size doesn't fit the requirement of .
member.remarks: The resize is accomplished by disposing of the GraphicsBuffer and instanciating a new one at the proper size.
member.param: The shader that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the X dimension that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the Y dimension that will be passed to .
Number of threads in the Z dimension that will be passed to .
The scratch buffer.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingHelper.ResizeScratchBufferForBuild(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer@)
member.summary: Resizes a scratch buffer if its size doesn't fit the requirement of .
member.remarks: The resize is accomplished by disposing of the GraphicsBuffer and instanciating a new one at the proper size.
member.param: The acceleration structure that will be passed to .
The scratch buffer.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingResources
member.summary: Utility shaders needed by a to operate.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingResources.Load
member.summary: Intializes the RayTracingResources.
member.remarks: This API works only in the Unity Editor, not at runtime.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingResources.LoadFromAssetBundle(UnityEngine.AssetBundle)
member.summary: Intializes the RayTracingResources by loading its utility shaders from an AssetBundle.
member.remarks: The necessary shaders are configured to belong to the unifiedraytracing AssetBundle which can be built by calling
member.param: The AssetBundle to load the shaders from.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingResources.LoadFromRenderPipelineResources
member.summary: Intializes the RayTracingResources by loading its utility shaders via GraphicsSettings.
member.remarks: This method only works in projects that use Scriptable Render Pipeline.
member.returns: Whether the resources were successfully loaded.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BackendHelpers
member.summary: Helper functions for querying the shader type and filename for a given backend.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BackendHelpers.GetFileNameOfShader(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a file path with the right extension for the given .
member.param: Backend for which the shader will be loaded.
Path to the shader file, without any extension.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.BackendHelpers.GetTypeOfShader(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.RayTracingBackend)
member.summary: Returns the of shader used by the given .
member.param: Backend for which the shader will be loaded.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingError
member.summary: Represents errors that can occur during UnifiedRayTracing calls.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingError.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown error.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingError.GraphicsBufferAllocationFailed
member.summary: Graphics Buffer allocation failed. It happens usually when the GPU runs out of memory. You can try to reduce your mesh data or your number of instances.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingException
member.summary: Exception type that can be thrown in case of failure in UnifiedRayTracing calls.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingException.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingError)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of
member.param: Message describing the error.
The error code.

member.name: P:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.UnifiedRayTracingException.errorCode
member.summary: Gets the code associated with the exception.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader
member.summary: Shader abstraction that is used to bind resources and execute a unified ray tracing shader (.urtshader) on the GPU.
member.remarks: It can be created by calling , or . Depending on the backend that was selected when creating the , this class either wraps a RayTracing or a Compute shader.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetAccelerationStructure(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.String,UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set an IRayTracingAccelStruct on this shader.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Name of the variable in shader code.
The IRayTracingAccelStruct to be used.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetIntParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set an integer parameter on this shader.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Value to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetFloatParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a float parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Value to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetVectorParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.Vector4)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a vector parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Value to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetMatrixParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.Matrix4x4)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a matrix parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Value to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetTextureParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.Rendering.RenderTargetIdentifier)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a texture parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Texture to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetBufferParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a buffer parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Buffer to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetBufferParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.ComputeBuffer)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a buffer parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
Buffer to set.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.Dispatch(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to dispatch this IRayTracingShader.
member.remarks: Dispatches to the GPU this shader to be executed on a grid of width*height*depth threads. Depending on the backend, the GPU ray traversal algorithm can require additional GPU storage that is supplied through the scratchBuffer parameter. Its required size can be queried by calling .
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Temporary buffer used during the shader's ray tracing calls.
Number of threads in the X dimension.
Number of threads in the Y dimension.
Number of threads in the Z dimension.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.Dispatch(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to dispatch this IRayTracingShader.
member.remarks: Dispatches to the GPU this shader to be executed on a grid of width*height*depth threads. The grid dimensions are read directly from the argsBuffer parameter. It needs to contain 3 integers: number of threads in X dimension, number of threads in Y dimension, number of threads in Z dimension. Typical use case is writing to argsBuffer from another shader and then dispatching this shader, without requiring a readback to the CPU. Depending on the backend, the GPU ray traversal algorithm can require additional GPU storage that is supplied through the scratchBuffer parameter. Its required size can be queried by calling .
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Temporary buffer used during the shader's ray tracing calls.
Buffer with work grid dimensions.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetConstantBufferParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a constant buffer parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
The buffer to bind as constant buffer.
The offset in bytes from the beginning of the buffer to bind. Must be a multiple of SystemInfo.constantBufferOffsetAlignment, or 0 if that value is 0.
The number of bytes to bind.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.SetConstantBufferParam(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,System.Int32,UnityEngine.ComputeBuffer,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to set a constant buffer parameter.
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the command to.
Property name ID. Use Shader.PropertyToID to get this ID.
The buffer to bind as constant buffer.
The offset in bytes from the beginning of the buffer to bind. Must be a multiple of SystemInfo.constantBufferOffsetAlignment, or 0 if that value is 0.
The number of bytes to bind.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.GetTraceScratchBufferRequiredSizeInBytes(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns the minimum buffer size that is required by the scratchBuffer parameter of . This size depends on the specific values for width,height and depth that will be passed to Dispatch().
member.param: Number of threads in the X dimension.
Number of threads in the Y dimension.
Number of threads in the Z dimension.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingShader.GetThreadGroupSizes
member.summary: Get the thread group sizes of this shader.
member.returns: Thread group size in the X,Y and Z directions.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.GraphicsHelpers.Flush(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer)
member.summary: Immediately executes the pending work on the command buffer. This is useful for preventing TDR, which can happen when scheduling too much work in one CommandBuffer.
member.param: Command buffer to execute.

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc
member.summary: Parameters used to configure the creation of instances that are part of a .

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.mesh
member.summary: The Mesh used to build this instance's geometry.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.subMeshIndex
member.summary: The index of the sub-mesh (MeshInstanceDesc references a single sub-mesh).

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.localToWorldMatrix
member.summary: The transformation matrix of the instance.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.mask
member.summary: The instance mask.
member.remarks: Instances in the acceleration structure contain an 8-bit user defined instance mask. The TraceRayClosestHit/TraceRayAnyHit HLSL functions have an 8-bit input parameter, InstanceInclusionMask which gets ANDed with the instance mask from any instance that is a candidate for intersection during acceleration structure traversal on the GPU. If the result of the AND operation is zero, the GPU ignores the intersection.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.instanceID
member.summary: Instance identifier. Can be accessed in the HLSL via the instanceID member of Hit (Hit is returned by the TraceRayClosestHit/TraceRayAnyHit HLSL functions).

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.enableTriangleCulling
member.summary: Whether front/back face culling for this ray tracing instance is enabled. Default value: true.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.frontTriangleCounterClockwise
member.summary: Whether to flip the way triangles face in this ray tracing instance. Default value: false.

member.name: F:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.opaqueGeometry
member.summary: Whether the geometry is considered opaque. Default value: true.
member.remarks: When an instance's opaqueGeometry field is set to false, the AnyHitExecute shader function will be invoked during the ray traversal when a hit is found. This alows the user to programmatically decide whether to reject or accept the candidate hit. This feature can, for example, be used to implement alpha cutout transparency. For best performance, prefer to set this parameter to false for as many geometries as possibe.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc.#ctor(UnityEngine.Mesh,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a MeshInstanceDesc.
member.param: The Mesh used to build this instance's geometry.
The index of the sub-mesh (MeshInstanceDesc references a single sub-mesh).

member.name: T:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct
member.summary: A data structure used to represent a collection of instances and geometries that are used for GPU ray tracing. It can be created by calling .

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.AddInstance(UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.MeshInstanceDesc)
member.summary: Adds an instance to the RayTracingAccelerationStructure.
member.param: The parameters describing this instance.
member.returns: A value representing a handle that you can use to perform later actions (e.g. RemoveInstance...)
member.exception: Thrown if the instance cannot be added. Inspect for the reason.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.RemoveInstance(System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes an instance.
member.param: The handle associated with an instance.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.ClearInstances
member.summary: Removes all ray tracing instances from the acceleration structure.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.UpdateInstanceTransform(System.Int32,UnityEngine.Matrix4x4)
member.summary: Updates the transformation of an instance.
member.param: The handle associated with an instance.
The new transformation matrix of the instance.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.UpdateInstanceID(System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Updates the instance ID of an instance.
member.param: The handle associated with an instance.
The new instance ID.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.UpdateInstanceMask(System.Int32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Updates the instance mask of an instance.
member.remarks: Ray tracing instances in the acceleration structure contain an 8-bit user defined instance mask. The TraceRay() HLSL function has an 8-bit input parameter, InstanceInclusionMask which gets ANDed with the instance mask from any ray tracing instance that is a candidate for intersection during acceleration structure traversal on the GPU. If the result of the AND operation is zero, the GPU ignores the intersection.
member.param: The handle associated with an instance.
The new mask.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.Build(UnityEngine.Rendering.CommandBuffer,UnityEngine.GraphicsBuffer)
member.summary: Adds a command in cmd to build this acceleration structure on the GPU.
member.remarks: Depending on the backend, the GPU build algorithm can require additional GPU storage that is supplied through the scratchBuffer parameter. Its required size can be queried by calling .
member.param: CommandBuffer to register the build command to.
Temporary buffer used during the build.
member.exception: Thrown if the build failed. Inspect for the reason.

member.name: M:UnityEngine.Rendering.UnifiedRayTracing.IRayTracingAccelStruct.GetBuildScratchBufferRequiredSizeInBytes
member.summary: Returns the minimum buffer size that is required by the scratchBuffer parameter of .
